def positive_high_frequency_code_path_logs_without_sampling_or_rate_limit():
    rule_id = "high_frequency_code_path_logs_without_sampling_or_rate_limit"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "logger.info or logger.debug called inside a loop without a sampling guard, risking log flood."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
